cases.description: Exact or tightly specified constants match their expected CODATA-backed values.
expected_properties: Planck constant remains in the expected order of magnitude

cases.description: Named and aliased lookups resolve the expected constants while unknown names fail closed.
Partial-name search returns stable hits for known constants.
expected_properties: find('planck') returns at least one Planck-related constant

cases.description: Temperature conversions preserve freezing/boiling references and round-trip across unit systems.
expected_properties: C -> F -> C round-trip is stable

cases.description: Electron-volt to joule conversion round-trips with negligible numerical drift.
Wavelength/frequency helpers remain inverse to each other for finite positive inputs.
Angle and mass helper conversions stay internally consistent.
